meanings.definition: cause to take on a definite and clear shape
examples: He tried to crystallize his thoughts

meanings.definition: make free from confusion or ambiguity; make clear
examples: Clear up the question of who is at fault

meanings.definition: cause to form crystals or assume crystalline form
having become fixed and definite in form; - Psychological Abstracts
examples: distinguish between crystallized and uncrystallized opinion

meanings.definition: having both internal structure and external form of a crystal
